prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次约1942→2223→2528→1951→2654，整体呈波动后移趋势，2024年因新高考模式调整位次短暂回升至1951，2025年大幅后移至 2654，近两年累计后移约700名；2025年基准约2654名；该校在甘肃省物理类招生计划持续扩招：2021年32人→2022年34人→2023年38人→2024年41人→2025年47人；2026年计划大幅增至92人，较2025年扩招约95.7%，为历年最大增幅，显著增加录取机会，竞争压力明显缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华南理工大学为985工程、211工程、双 一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名2026年第32名，近年排名稳定在25–32名区间，属国内顶尖工科强校；2026年声誉评价为明显负面，主要涉及校园偷拍事 件（男生教室内偷拍女生裙底），相关舆情在抖音等平台广泛传播，可能对部分考生及家长的报考意愿产生一定抑制效应；抖音热度排名第87位，评价为一般，未出现高热关注。 轻工技术与工程A+（全国顶尖）、化学工程与技术A、材料科学与工程A、环境科学与工程A、食品科学与工程A、建筑学A-、控制科学与工程A-、机械工程A-、管 理科学与工程A-；共9个学科获评A-及以上，工科整体实力突出，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业为高热推 荐，社会报考热度持续升温；土木建筑类分化观望，生化环材类明显劝退。甘肃省2026年高考总人数约218700人，较2025年（历史类+物理类约179817人）增长约21. 6%，考生规模扩大加剧整体竞争；华南理工大学位于广东省广州市，属一线城市，对西北地区考生有较强地域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次2654、2026年招生计划大幅扩招约95.7%（位次后移主导因素）、学校层次高且工科实力强劲（吸引 高分考生）、声誉负面事件（抑制部分报考意愿）、本省考生总数增长约21.6%（竞争加剧）等多重因素，扩招效应最为显著，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年明显后移；预测 最低位次约4079名，区间3579–4579名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 1942 → 2223 → 2528 → 1951 → 2654, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In 2024, due to the adjustment of the new college entrance examination model, the ranking briefly rebounded to 1951, but in 2025 it significantly moved back to 2654, with a cumulative backward shift of about 700 places over the past two years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 2654. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Gansu Province has been continuously expanding: 32 in 2021 → 34 in 2022 → 38 in 2023 → 41 in 2024 → 47 in 2025. In 2026, the plan significantly increases to 92, an expansion of about 95.7% compared to 2025, the largest increase in history, significantly increasing admission opportunities and markedly easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: South China University of Technology is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, it ranks 32nd, with a stable ranking in the 25–32 range in recent years, making it a top domestic engineering powerhouse. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly involving a campus voyeurism incident (a male student secretly filming under a female student's skirt in a classroom), with related public opinion spreading widely on platforms such as Douyin, which may have a certain inhibitory effect on the willingness of some candidates and parents to apply. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 87th, with an evaluation of average, without high attention. Light Industry Technology and Engineering is A+ (top in the country), Chemical Engineering and Technology is A, Materials Science and Engineering is A, Environmental Science and Engineering is A, Food Science and Engineering is A, Architecture is A-, Control Science and Engineering is A-, Mechanical Engineering is A-, and Management Science and Engineering is A-. A total of 9 disciplines are rated A- or above, with outstanding overall engineering strength, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly recommended, with continuously rising social application heat. Civil Engineering and Architecture are in a wait-and-see state, while Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials are clearly discouraged. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the college entrance examination in Gansu Province is approximately 218,700, an increase of about 21.6% compared to 2025 (History Category + Physics Category approximately 179,817). The expansion of the candidate pool intensifies overall competition. South China University of Technology is located in Guangzhou City, Guangdong Province, a first-tier city, which has a strong regional attraction for candidates from the northwest region.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 2654, the significant enrollment expansion of about 95.7% in 2026 (the dominant factor for ranking backward shift), the high university level and strong engineering strength (attracting high-scoring candidates), the negative reputation incident (inhibiting some application willingness), and the increase in the total number of candidates in the province by about 21.6% (intensifying competition), the expansion effect is the most significant. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will significantly move back compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4079, with a range of 3579–4579.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking range is 3579–4579. It is recommended that candidates with a ranking within 4000 mainly target Tier 2, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety. Candidates with a ranking significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 3579) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors (Outstanding Talent Class, Electrical Engineering, Information Engineering). Candidates with a ranking close to the upper limit of the range (around 4500) are advised to mainly target Tier 3, supplemented by Tier 2.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including Liberal Arts) was approximately 597 → 591 → 621 → 899 → 947, showing an overall backward trend. In 2024, due to the new college entrance examination reform, the ranking significantly shifted backward from 621 to 899, and continued to move backward to 947 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 326 positions over the past two years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 947. The enrollment plan for History Category in Gansu Province remained stable at 11 students from 2021 to 2025. In 2026, the plan increases to 13 students, an expansion of about 18.2% compared to 2025, slightly increasing admission opportunities.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: South China University of Technology is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. It ranks 32nd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, making it a top domestic university with strong brand appeal to liberal arts candidates. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is significantly negative, mainly due to campus voyeurism incidents, which may suppress the willingness of some candidates and parents to apply. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 87th, with an average evaluation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is socially recommended (slightly hot), Economics is divided and wait-and-see, Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Gansu Province is approximately 218,700, an increase of about 21.6% compared to 2025, which intensifies overall competition but is not included in the judgment. South China University of Technology is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong Province, a first-tier city with strong regional appeal to candidates from the northwest. The enrollment number for History Category in Gansu Province is small (13 students), leading to relatively concentrated competition. However, the brand effect of a 985 university still has strong appeal to liberal arts candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 947, the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan by about 18.2% (ranking shift backward), negative reputation incidents (suppressing some application willingness), and the increase in the total number of candidates in the province by about 21.6% (intensified competition), the effects of expansion and candidate growth partially offset each other. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will shift slightly backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1030, with a range of 830 to 1230.
